sessions_sample.raw: 110 min.: Hilly Workout  +  3x through:  8 SLS;  20 glute bridges;  1 min. plank

unhandled_patterns.pattern: 3x through:  40 squats;  1 min. plank;  20 lunges per leg;  15 push-ups;  25 glute bridges
unhandled_patterns.issue: The parser may not handle the '3x through' format correctly, as it implies repetition of a circuit.
unhandled_patterns.suggested_rule: Recognize 'x through' as a pattern indicating repeated sets of exercises.

unhandled_patterns.pattern: 10 min.: WU  20 min.: 50% effort  on climb;  70% effort on descent  10 min.: CD
unhandled_patterns.issue: The session includes specific effort levels which are not currently parsed.
unhandled_patterns.suggested_rule: Extract and categorize effort levels specified in sessions.
